title: castanea edonii
intro: Castanea edonii, also known as Edoni Chestnut or Greek Chestnut, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the beech family (Fagaceae). It is native to Greece and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an antiseptic. The plant's extracts and leaves are rich in tannins and flavonoids, providing health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Castanea edonii is often prepared as a herbal tea or dried extract, although its availability is extremely limited due to conservation efforts.
